SimplerDevelopment — Demo Capture Fixture

Screen Capture Test Page

Type into the field, click the button, and scroll — all interactions show clearly on video.

Waiting for input…
Panel Active

Feature A

Drag-and-drop block editor with live preview. Changes are reflected instantly in the visual editor canvas.

Feature B

Per-tenant theming with brand tokens. Each client site inherits a design system from a central theme config.

Feature C

AI-assisted content drafting. Generate copy, headlines, and CTAs directly from the block editor toolbar.

Feature D

One-click publish with CDN invalidation. Ship changes to live in under three seconds, with automatic rollback.

Feature E

Embedded form builder. Drag survey blocks, connect to CRM, and view submissions in the client portal.

Feature F

Workflow automations. Trigger email sequences, Slack alerts, or webhook calls from any CRM event.

sd-create-short · capture-target.html · test fixture only
